meaning: n.牛津大学图书馆 adj.牛津大学图书馆的
examples: The Bodleian is currently engaged in a mass-digitisation project with Google.
The first part, consisting of 224 leaves, is in the Bodleian Library at Oxford.
It boasts a quiet atmosphere, friendly colleagues, and the four-hundred-year-old Bodleian library, which has over five million books.
This is one of the many recent initiatives the Bodleian Library has taken to make the library and its contents more accessible.
Papers from the archive of poet Cecil Day-Lewis have been donated to Oxford University's Bodleian Libraries by his actor son Daniel and daughter Tamasin.
